description_long: This sculpture is a rectangular, box-like structure with intricate relief carvings on its sides and a prominent reclining figure on the top. The sides are divided into three panels, each featuring detailed, high-relief scenes with human and possibly mythological figures. The top of the sculpture depicts a draped, recumbent figure holding an object, possibly a staff or scepter, with additional decorative elements surrounding the figure. The base is broad and slightly flared, providing stability and a sense of monumentality. The entire object appears to be made of a dark, stone-like material, giving it a somber and dignified appearance. The craftsmanship suggests a commemorative or funerary purpose, with a focus on narrative and symbolic detail.
description: A dark, rectangular sculpture with detailed relief carvings on the sides and a reclining figure on top, resembling a commemorative or funerary monument.
description_view_0: Front view showing three detailed relief panels and the full length of the reclining figure on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one relief panel and the head and upper body of the reclining figure.
description_view_2: Rear view with three relief panels and the back of the reclining figure, less detail visible on the figure's face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing one relief panel and the feet and lower body of the reclining figure.
attribute_subject_matter: reclining human figure with narrative relief panels
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
